gui.settings_desc: Adjust ARIEL's behavior visually and securely.
gui.api_key_missing: ⚠️ API Key needs to be introduced
gui.tools_desc: These are the capabilities ARIEL has installed and ready to use:
gui.integrations_desc: Configure gateways for ARIEL to communicate with the outside world.
gui.no_logs: No log files generated in the system yet.
gui.select_log: 📂 Select the session to monitor (First is the most recent):
gui.error_log: Could not load the log file:
gui.profiles_desc: Easily edit your personal information and ARIEL's identity.
gui.help_provider: The AI engine. Anthropic (Claude cloud) or OpenAI Compatible (LM Studio, Ollama, GPT, etc.)
gui.help_api_key: Your secret key. Do not share it. It acts as your 'password' to use the AI.
gui.help_model: The specific 'brain' to use. The default is the most balanced one.
gui.help_temp: 0.0 is logical and strict. 1.0 is very creative and unpredictable.
gui.help_tokens: The maximum length of the response. 4096 is a good standard.
gui.help_steps: How many consecutive attempts ARIEL can make to solve a task before giving up.
gui.help_dest: Console: Visible in the black screen. GUI: Saved in the Debug tab.
gui.help_lang: The language in which you will see the buttons and menus of this web.
gui.help_name: How you want ARIEL to call you.
gui.help_tz: So the agent knows what time it is where you are.
gui.help_hobbies: Helps ARIEL understand your interests to give you better answers.
gui.help_detail: Low: very short answers. High: long and detailed explanations.
gui.help_apps: Programs you use daily (e.g., chrome, excel). ARIEL will know they are safe.
gui.help_notes: Any extra quirks or rules you want the agent to always remember about you.
gui.help_a_sec: Other things the agent knows how to do besides its main role.
gui.help_a_traits: Adjectives that define its personality (e.g., Honest, Fast, Sarcastic).
gui.help_a_verb: Low: Gets to the point. High: Very talkative.
gui.tasks_desc: Set up routines for ARIEL to run automatically on its own.
gui.ph_task_prompt: E.g., Check my inbox and summarize it...
gui.no_lt_mem: ARIEL hasn't learned anything long-term yet.
gui.loading_agent: 🤖 Starting ARIEL... (first launch may take a moment while AI models are downloaded)
gui.setup_subtitle: Welcome! You can protect ARIEL with a password.
gui.pwd_remove_warn: Tokens will be stored in plaintext. Anyone with access to your files could read them.
gui.pwd_removed_ok: ✅ Password removed. Tokens stored in plaintext.
gui.pwd_create_desc: Encrypt your API and Telegram tokens on disk.
gui.welcome_message:
Hey! 👋 I'm **ARIEL**, your personal AI assistant. I can control your computer, manage files, search the web, automate tasks and much more — all through natural language. Tell me about yourself so I can personalize my help. And don't forget to set your API Key in ⚙️ Settings!

¡Hola! 👋 Soy **ARIEL**, tu asistente personal de IA. Puedo controlar tu ordenador, gestionar archivos, buscar en la web, automatizar tareas y mucho más — todo con lenguaje natural. Cuéntame sobre ti para personalizar mi ayuda. ¡Y no olvides configurar tu API Key en ⚙️ Configuración!
gui.help_conf_destructive: ARIEL will ask for confirmation in the chat before deleting files or running dangerous commands.
gui.help_notif_tg: Automatically send a summary via Telegram when a task finishes.
gui.set_cu_fallback: Enable Computer Use fallback (vision-based, higher API cost)
gui.help_cu_fallback: When enabled, ARIEL can fall back to screenshot-based control for apps without accessibility support. This uses more API tokens.
gui.help_wa_numbers: Leave empty to accept messages from anyone who writes to your WhatsApp number. This is fine for personal use — only people who know your number can contact you.
gui.wa_scan_qr: Scan this QR code with WhatsApp
gui.wa_qr_terminal: Check the terminal for the QR code to scan.
gui.wa_help: WhatsApp connects via Linked Devices (like WhatsApp Web). Scan the QR on first start. Security: only contacts in your phone address book can interact with ARIEL, and if a passphrase is set, they must send it first to activate their access.
gui.wa_qr_loading: QR code is being generated... Close and reopen this window in a few seconds.
gui.wa_qr_reopen: After scanning, close this window and reopen Connectors to see the updated status.
gui.wa_numbers_placeholder: Leave empty to accept all messages
gui.help_wa_passphrase: A secret phrase that contacts must send as their first message to activate ARIEL. Only contacts in your phone address book who also know the passphrase can use the bot. Leave empty to accept all known contacts without a passphrase.
gui.wa_revoked: All authorizations revoked. Contacts will need to send the passphrase again.
gui.help_base_url: Server URL. LM Studio: http://localhost:1234/v1 · Ollama: http://localhost:11434/v1
gui.help_api_key_local: API key. For local servers (LM Studio, Ollama) leave empty or type anything.
gui.error_ipc: ❌ Could not connect to the ARIEL orchestrator. Make sure ariel.py is running.
gui.warning_model_thinking: ⚠️ The local model used all its capacity on internal reasoning and could not produce a response. Try again, or increase Max Tokens in Settings.
gui.wa_revoked_full: All authorizations revoked and device unlinked. Press ▶️ Start Bot to scan a new QR code.

tg.access_denied: ⛔ Access denied. You are not my creator.
tg.start_greeting: 🤖 Hello Architect! I am ARIEL. I am connected to your computer and ready for commands via Telegram.
tg.default_file_prompt: I have uploaded this file. Analyze it.
tg.system_file_uploaded: SYSTEM: The user has uploaded a file to {path}. Instruction: {instruction}

start.all_online: All systems online. Press Ctrl+C in this console to shut down ARIEL.
start.shutdown_complete: System shut down correctly. See you soon!
start.initializing_agent: Initializing ARIEL agent (first launch may take a moment)...
start.api_key_encrypted: API Key encrypted. Agent will re-authenticate after GUI login.
start.api_key_encrypted_ok: API Key decrypted successfully via CLI.
start.tg_after_login: Telegram will start after GUI login.
start.wa_after_login: WhatsApp will start after GUI login.

wa.access_denied: Access denied. Your number is not authorized.
wa.not_a_contact: ⛔ Access denied. You are not a known contact.
wa.authorized_ok: ✅ Authorized! You can now send commands to ARIEL.
wa.need_passphrase: 🔐 You are a known contact but you need to send the passphrase first to activate ARIEL.
